Optionally update a container right after it's safely backed up.

## Added

- **Update after successful backup (per container).** Turn on **Update after successful backup** on any container (Advanced, off by default) and BombVault will, after a successful backup, pull the container's image and recreate it — but **only when a newer image is actually available**, so a nightly backup never needlessly restarts a container that's already up to date. The just-taken backup is your safety net: if an update misbehaves, the fresh snapshot is one restore away. Each update is recorded as its own **Update** run in the dashboard's Run History. Works for both scheduled and manual backups. (#52)

Thanks to @strese for the request.
